policies.name: Department Isolation
policies.description: Users may only access resources belonging to their own department, unless they hold an exempt role.

policies.name: Classification Clearance Check
policies.description: User clearance level must meet or exceed the resource classification.

policies.name: Business Hours Access Control
policies.description: Access is only permitted during business hours (08:00–18:00). Admin is exempt.

policies.name: External Access Restriction
policies.description: Users connecting from an external location cannot access confidential or secret resources.

policies.name: Delete Operation Restriction
policies.description: Only the Admin role may delete resources (Separation of Duties).
